_readme: MCP server configuration for BC ALM workflow. Configure the azure-devops server with your organization and project details. The github server uses your existing GitHub authentication. See https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/customizing-copilot/using-model-context-protocol for MCP setup instructions.

azure-devops.note: Replace with your Azure DevOps MCP server URL. Community MCP server for ADO: https://github.com/microsoft/azure-devops-mcp

github.note: GitHub MCP server — uses your existing GitHub Copilot authentication. No additional configuration needed.
